name: Ham and Cheese Bugles
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the white bread.
2. Trim off the crusts.
3. Combine the minced onion with the cheddar cheese in a bowl. Add the celery seed and pepper, mixing well.
4. Spread the mixture generously on the toasted bread slices.
5. Slice the bread into 1-inch-wide strips.
6. Trim the ham slices to fit the length of the bread strips.
7. Roll a thin ham slice around each bread strip and secure with a cellophane-tipped toothpick.
8. Refrigerate until serving time. Makes 30.
